title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 20 curation claim opened
body: Opened claim d76458be-37f8-4381-80b1-b8262ef14c85 for legacy backlog batch 20 after live state showed 0 active claims and 0 active commit intents. Scope: next five pending legacy backlog entries from outcome optionality through retired-thread hygiene. Processing in place only. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
